assertions.title: t() returns correct zh-CN string
assertions.reasoning: Using the runtime i18n module (`/abyssfire/src/i18n/index.ts`), `setLocale('zh-CN')` followed by `t('menu.newGame')` returned `新的旅程`. The rendered menu also displayed the zh-CN New Game label correctly.

steps.action: Import the i18n runtime module and call `setLocale('zh-CN'); t('menu.newGame')`.
steps.expected: Return the zh-CN New Game string.

steps.action: Inspect the rendered menu in the browser.
steps.expected: The main menu shows the zh-CN New Game label.
steps.observed: The top menu button rendered as `新的旅程`.

evidence.consoleErrors: none; browser console showed only non-blocking AudioContext autoplay warnings before user gesture

assertions.title: t() returns correct en string
assertions.reasoning: After `setLocale('en')`, `t('menu.newGame')` returned `New Journey`, and the rendered menu switched fully to English with `NEW JOURNEY`, `Controls`, and `Language` visible.

steps.action: Call `setLocale('en'); t('menu.newGame')` in the runtime i18n module.
steps.expected: Return a non-empty English New Game string.

steps.action: Inspect the rendered menu after switching to English.
steps.expected: Visible menu labels update to English without reload.
steps.observed: Menu rendered in English with `NEW JOURNEY`, `Controls`, `Soundtrack`, `Credits`, and `Language`.

evidence.consoleErrors: none; browser console showed only non-blocking AudioContext autoplay warnings before user gesture

assertions.title: t() returns correct zh-TW string
assertions.reasoning: With `setLocale('zh-TW')`, `t('menu.newGame')` returned `新的旅程`. This specific string uses characters that are identical in simplified and traditional Chinese, so the runtime and rendered zh-TW state were confirmed using adjacent zh-TW menu labels and supplemental `t('menu.help')` output (`遊戲控製`).

steps.action: Call `setLocale('zh-TW'); t('menu.newGame')` in the runtime i18n module.
steps.expected: Return the zh-TW New Game string.
steps.observed: Returned `新的旅程`; the value is valid for zh-TW because the characters in this phrase do not change between scripts.

steps.action: Inspect the rendered menu after switching to zh-TW.
steps.expected: The menu is visibly in Traditional Chinese.
steps.observed: The menu showed zh-TW labels including `語言` and `遊戲控製`, confirming the zh-TW locale state while `新的旅程` remained script-identical.

evidence.consoleErrors: none; browser console showed only non-blocking AudioContext autoplay warnings before user gesture

assertions.title: t() parameter interpolation works
assertions.reasoning: In English locale, `t('menu.continue', { class: 'Warrior', level: 5 })` returned `Continue - Warrior Lv.5`, so both parameters were interpolated and no raw placeholders remained.

steps.expected: Return a string containing `Warrior` and `5` with no `{class}` or `{level}` placeholders left.

evidence.consoleErrors: none; browser console showed only non-blocking AudioContext autoplay warnings before user gesture

assertions.title: t() parameter interpolation with zh-CN class names
assertions.reasoning: In zh-CN locale, `t('menu.continue', { class: '战士', level: 10 })` returned `继续游戏 - 战士 Lv.10`, confirming correct interpolation of the Chinese class name and numeric level.

steps.expected: Return a zh-CN string containing `战士` and `10` with no raw placeholders left.
steps.observed: Returned `继续游戏 - 战士 Lv.10`.

evidence.consoleErrors: none; browser console showed only non-blocking AudioContext autoplay warnings before user gesture

frictions.description: `menu.newGame` renders identically in zh-CN and zh-TW (`新的旅程`), so zh-TW rendered confirmation required checking adjacent menu labels and a supplemental runtime translation value.
frictions.resolution: Used the zh-TW screenshot (`語言`, `遊戲控製`) plus runtime `t('menu.help')` output to confirm the locale switch while leaving the tested key unchanged.

summary: Tested 5 assertions (VAL-FOUND-001 through VAL-FOUND-005): all 5 passed. Runtime translation calls returned the expected zh-CN, English, and zh-TW/interpolated strings, and the rendered menu screenshots confirmed zh-CN, English, and zh-TW states. No page errors were present; the browser console only emitted non-blocking AudioContext autoplay warnings before user interaction.
